name: Eggless Waffles
tagline: Crisp-edged Belgian-style waffles, no eggs needed
highlight: Cornstarch + carbonated water = the crispest no-egg waffle

hero.alt: Belgian waffles stacked with butter and syrup
hero.caption: eggless waffles — crisp pockets

healthFacts: No eggs — cornstarch + bubbles drive the crisp.
Carbonated water lightens batter and creates lacy edges.
Cornstarch keeps waffles crisp for longer than flour alone.

steps.title: Whisk dry
steps.detail: Whisk flour, cornstarch, sugar, baking powder, salt in a bowl.
steps.tip: Sift if you have time — cornstarch loves to clump.

steps.title: Whisk wet, last second
steps.detail: In another bowl, whisk milk, melted butter, vanilla. Just before cooking, add cold sparkling water.
steps.tip: Bubbles deflate — the longer the batter sits, the less crisp the waffle.

steps.title: Fold and rest 1 minute
steps.detail: Fold wet into dry until just combined. Rest 1 minute — barely longer.

steps.title: Cook till deep gold
steps.detail: Pour into a hot, oiled waffle iron. Cook until the edges go deep gold and steam slows — usually 4–5 minutes per Belgian waffle.
steps.tip: Pull pale = chewy. Pull dark = crisp. Pick your camp.
